reviews.review_description: Game is fun? However the big guys with the boulders are really clunky and there is almost no way of stopping the Boulder from harming you ever. A couple little glitches but other then that I hope for updates.

reviews.review_title: I hope this is released officially
reviews.review_description: Right up my marvel street this I just hope that when or if it is released it’s made true to the marvel film hammer etc it will sell millions!

What an awesome game. That hammer is my favorite weapon in the Marvel universe. This may as well be my new favorite game in VR. Big thumbs up to the person who made this VR game. Although i see that when the hammer is floating in the air and touches a frost giant, it has the same impact as when you do a hammer throw. So i think there's still some things about this game that could be improved.
Great game but I have not had any update if think this game is bad it does not matter it is FREE
I digg! Hope to see this go to the next level !   Skoll!
I was amazed by it’s quality but I wish there was more replay ability like cosmetics or boss fights you can unlock. But overall fun game
